data_quality: v0.1 best-effort seed populated from cited public sources and manufacturer specs. FPV is rapidly evolving; spec verification required for production launch.

sources.name: Pyrodrone / GetFPV / RaceDayQuads public spec pages
sources.scope: Used for retailer-confirmed component specs (stator size, KV, mount pattern, current ratings, weight) and bundle compatibility notes.

sources.name: Oscar Liang FPV blog tutorials
sources.scope: Used for cross-checked motor/ESC/prop pairings, BLHeli firmware compatibility notes, and Betaflight target identifiers.

sources.name: r/Multicopter and r/fpv public threads
sources.scope: Used for real-world build reports, current-draw observations, and noted incompatibilities (e.g. analog frames not fitting DJI O3 modules).

sources.name: Manufacturer pages (iFlight, T-Motor, EMAX, Holybro, BetaFPV, Caddx, Walksnail, DJI, RadioMaster)
sources.scope: Used for authoritative electrical/mechanical specs: stack size, mount pattern, MCU/gyro IDs, voltage/current ratings, weight, connector types.

sources.name: ELRS / TBS Crossfire control link docs
sources.scope: Used for radio protocol identification, transmitter/receiver pairing rules, and frequency band confirmation.

sources.name: BLHeli32 / AM32 / Bluejay firmware docs
sources.scope: Used for ESC firmware compatibility, MCU class identification, and supported protocol matrix (DShot300/600/1200).

sources.name: Betaflight wiki and target list
sources.scope: Used to map flight controller hardware to Betaflight targets and to confirm gyro/MCU compatibility with current firmware.

constraints.description: motor.mount_pattern must be present in frame.motor_mount_pattern set
battery.s_count must fall within motor.recommended_battery_s range
esc.current_burst_a > motor.peak_current * 4 (rough headroom check across 4 motors)
camera.kind must be in frame.hd_camera_compat (analog frames don't fit DJI O3)
flight_controller.supports_dji_o3 must be true if camera.kind = 'hd_dji_o3'
